languages.text: {n}Визоры Паскаля алеют, а в голосе лязгает пласталь.{/n} "Призываю к активации алгоритма побиения мерзости техноереси! Омниссия требует утилизации нечестивых ксеномеханизмов!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Визоры Паскаля алеют, а в голосе лязгает пласталь.{/n} "Призываю к активации алгоритма побиения мерзости техноереси! Омниссия возводит алтарь, чтобы верные могли пролить машинное масло на нем во славу Его!"
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"
languages.original_text: {n}Визоры Паскаля алеют, а в голосе лязгает пласталь.{/n} "Призываю к активации алгоритма побиения мерзости техноереси! Омниссия требует утилизации нечестивых ксеномеханизмов!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

{n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson, and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge.{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for the smiting of technoheretical filth! The Omnissiah raises an altar, that the faithful may spill machine oil upon it to His glory!"

{n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

{n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

{n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

languages.text: {n}Los visores de Pasqal se vuelven rojos y su voz es tan áspera y cortante como el plastiacero.{/n} «¡Exijo la activación del algoritmo de castigo de la basura tecnohereje! ¡El Omnissiah exige la eliminación de los impíos xenomecanismos!».
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Los visores de Pasqal se vuelven rojos y su voz es tan áspera y cortante como el plastiacero.{/n} «¡Exijo la activación del algoritmo de castigo de la basura tecnohereje! ¡El Omnissiah exige la eliminación de los impíos xenomecanismos!».

languages.text: {n}帕斯卡的目镜骤然亮起猩红光芒，他的声音沙哑刺耳，如塑钢摩擦一般：{/n}“我要求立即启动肃清技术异端污秽的算法！欧姆尼赛亚要求销毁这些亵渎神圣的异形机械！”
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}帕斯卡的目镜骤然亮起猩红光芒，他的声音沙哑刺耳，如塑钢摩擦一般：{/n}“我要求立即启动肃清技术异端污秽的算法！欧姆尼赛亚要求销毁这些亵渎神圣的异形机械！”

languages.text: {n}La visière de Pasqal vire au pourpre et sa voix grince comme du plastacier :{/n} « Je demande l'activation de l'algorithme de destruction des immondices technohérétiques ! L'Omnimessie exige l'élimination des xénomécanismes impies ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La visière de Pasqal vire au pourpre et sa voix grince comme du plastacier :{/n} « Je demande l'activation de l'algorithme de destruction des immondices technohérétiques ! L'Omnimessie exige l'élimination des xénomécanismes impies ! »

languages.text: {n}Pasqal'ın vizörleri kızarıyor ve sesi rahatsız edici, çelik gibi keskin bir tonda çıkıyor.{/n} "Tekno kâfir pisliklerini yok etme algoritmasının etkinleştirilmesi çağrısında bulunuyorum! Hermesih, kutsiyetten yoksun zenomekanizmaların imha edilmesini emrediyor!"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal'ın vizörleri kızarıyor ve sesi rahatsız edici, çelik gibi keskin bir tonda çıkıyor.{/n} "Tekno kâfir pisliklerini yok etme algoritmasının etkinleştirilmesi çağrısında bulunuyorum! Hermesih, kutsiyetten yoksun zenomekanizmaların imha edilmesini emrediyor!"

languages.text: {n}Pasqals Visoren flackern blutrot und seine Stimme gleicht einem Reibeisen aus Plastahl.{/n} "Ich bitte um die Aktivierung des Algorithmus für die Vernichtung von tech-ketzerischem Abschaum! Der Omnissiah verlangt die Entsorgung des unheiligen Xenomechanismus!"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqals Visoren flackern blutrot und seine Stimme gleicht einem Reibeisen aus Plastahl.{/n} "Ich bitte um die Aktivierung des Algorithmus für die Vernichtung von tech-ketzerischem Abschaum! Der Omnissiah verlangt die Entsorgung des unheiligen Xenomechanismus!"

languages.text: {n}パスクールのバイザーが赤く光り、彼の声は金属的な音色でかすれた声で響く。{/n}「テクノ異端の汚物を滅ぼすためのアルゴリズムの起動を要求する！全知の神は異端の機械を排除することを求めている！」
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"

traits.locale_text: {n}パスクールのバイザーが赤く光り、彼の声は金属的な音色でかすれた声で響く。{/n}「テクノ異端の汚物を滅ぼすためのアルゴリズムの起動を要求する！全知の神は異端の機械を排除することを求めている！」
